title: Enderman Grief
description: Prevents enderman from picking up blocks, except melons and pumpkins.
body:
# Enderman Grief

A lightweight, free and open-source datapack for Minecraft 1.21+ that prevents enderman from griefing your world.

## What it does

By default, enderman can pick up and move many blocks, which can slowly damage builds and terrain.

This datapack removes almost all blocks from the enderman pickup list, preventing unwanted block theft.

## Exceptions

Enderman can still pick up:
- Melons![Enderman carrying a melon block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LLomXBnX/images/b8f9da1b27e727384299796bbafb813cefec266e.png)
- Pumpkins![Enderman carrying a pumpkin block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LLomXBnX/images/2db0f29d322885651c312b4bd15cc90c2975631d.png)

## Compatibility

- Minecraft 1.21+
- Works in both singleplayer and multiplayer
- Vanilla friendly (no mods required)

## Disclaimer

This datapack might not work with datapacks or mods that impact what items can be carried by endermans.

### Credits
The description and summary have been created by Karmageddon Games
